old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-r2jc","title":"Correct SCHC receiver retry oracle","description":"schc_fragmentation.json requires Receiver-Abort instead of the fifth ACK when Attempts is 4, contradicting RFC 8724 Section 8.4.3.2 and the draft prose, which send ACK, increment, then abort when exceeding MAX_ACK_REQUESTS. Establish the correct independent oracle before any language migration. Blocks conditional SCHC profile/vector slice.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-07-21T02:32:33.759000397Z","created_by":"ec2-user","updated_at":"2026-07-21T02:32:33.759000397Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-r2jc","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-7fqg.2","type":"discovered-from","created_at":"2026-07-21T02:32:33.844041744Z","created_by":"ec2-user","metadata":"{}"}]}
